nasb.text: They also took away the pots, the shovels, the snuffers, the basins, the pans and all the bronze vessels which were used in temple service.

esv.text: And they took away the pots and the shovels and the snuffers and the basins and the dishes for incense and all the vessels of bronze used in the temple service;

cnv.text: 他們又把鍋、鏟子、燭剪、碗、碟子，和敬拜用的一切銅器都拿去了。

ccb.text: 并带走了盆、铲、蜡剪、碗、碟及一切献祭用的铜器。
